name: Posse Foundation Scholarship
amount: Full tuition scholarship at a Posse partner institution

eligibility.citizenship: U.S. citizen, permanent resident, or DACA
eligibility.other_requirements: Must be nominated by high school or community organization; exceptional leadership potential; collaborative mindset; from a Posse city (Atlanta, Boston, Chicago, D.C., Houston, Los Angeles, Miami, New York, New Orleans, San Francisco)

stackable_notes: Scholarship is provided by the partner institution — it replaces rather than stacks with institutional aid, covering full tuition. Students receive the Posse scholarship in lieu of standard financial aid package at partner schools.
notes: Students cannot apply directly — they must be nominated by their high school or a community partner organization. Posse sends cohorts of 10 scholars from each city to partner colleges, providing built-in peer support. The program prioritizes students who might be overlooked by traditional admissions but show extraordinary leadership in non-traditional ways.
